name: expo-automerge-crdt
description: Native Automerge CRDT module for React Native using Rust

scripts.build:rust:android: cd rust && cargo ndk --target aarch64-linux-android --target armv7-linux-androideabi --target x86_64-linux-android --platform 24 build --release
scripts.build:rust:ios: cd rust && cargo build --target aarch64-apple-ios --release && cargo build --target aarch64-apple-ios-sim --release && cargo build --target x86_64-apple-ios --release
scripts.copy:android: mkdir -p android/src/main/jniLibs/{arm64-v8a,armeabi-v7a,x86_64} && cp rust/target/aarch64-linux-android/release/libexpo_automerge.so android/src/main/jniLibs/arm64-v8a/ && cp rust/target/armv7-linux-androideabi/release/libexpo_automerge.so android/src/main/jniLibs/armeabi-v7a/ && cp rust/target/x86_64-linux-android/release/libexpo_automerge.so android/src/main/jniLibs/x86_64/
scripts.build:android: npm run build:rust:android && npm run copy:android
